title: The Mouse That Stopped Working
ticket: A training PC lost mouse control during a practice session.
clue: Check the simple causes before trying big fixes.
tooltip: Use keyboard fallback and basic hardware checks first.
careerConnection: Technicians triage peripherals during first-line support.

interactiveDemo.prompt: What is the safest first test?
interactiveDemo.hint: Start with the smallest reversible check.

actionTask.instructions: Use keyboard navigation to confirm pointer settings and restore mouse control.
actionTask.expectedResult: Mouse or pointer control is usable again.
actionTask.screenshotExample: Mouse settings screen with normal pointer speed.

repeatTask: Repeat the same recovery path with fewer hints.
breakFixTask: Set pointer speed too low, then fix it.
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without help?
ticketCompletion: The training PC input works again and the learner stayed calm.

translationTerms.plain: A key combo that does something fast.
translationTerms.why: Lets you keep working without the mouse.

translationTerms.plain: The arrow you move on the screen.
translationTerms.why: You cannot click anything without it.
translationTerms.example: Move the pointer to a button
